caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones, is seated indoors against a plain wall and light-colored curtains. On-screen text in the bottom-left corner of each scene reads "Nancy Ramya". In the initial sequence, she looks toward the camera while speaking, gesturing with her right hand raised near her shoulder. As the scene progresses, she lifts both hands toward her head, appearing to adjust her headphones or touch her hair. Her expression shifts slightly as she continues to speak, with her mouth open. The background remains static, showing a simple room with curtains on the left and a neutral-toned wall behind her. Throughout the clip, the camera angle remains a medium close-up, focusing on her head and shoulders as she interacts with the headphones.
